flags.summary: In-state tuition at Eastern Connecticut State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.3k → $13.9k).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Connecticut State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Eastern Connecticut State University fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.7k → $17.4k).
